summary: iOS 🟥 Incorrect name and inaccessible settings after deleting device
scenario: After deleting a paired device from the app, the remaining device displays the deleted device's name and connection status, and its settings become inaccessible until the app is restarted.
description_clean: After deleting a paired device from the app, the remaining device shows incorrect name and connection status (from the deleted device), and its settings become inaccessible. Restarting the app resolves the issue.
steps: Open the app and ensure at least two devices are paired.
Delete one of the paired devices from the app.
Observe the remaining device's name and connection status.
Attempt to access the settings of the remaining device.
Observe the remaining device's name, connection status, and settings accessibility after restart.
expected: After deleting a paired device, the remaining device should retain its correct name and connection status, and its settings should remain accessible.
actual: After deleting a paired device, the remaining device shows the incorrect name and connection status (from the deleted device), and its settings become inaccessible. Restarting the app resolves the issue.
